arts.ttl: Leicester's Cooper claims 'proof' of VAR error
arts.sum: Leicester City boss Steve Cooper has claimed an "awful human error" by the VAR was "hidden" following his side's 2-2 draw at Crystal Palace last weekend.

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche brings up Carlo Ancelotti's Everton comments in response to critics
arts.sum: Sean Dyche is under fire because Everton have averaged just 40 per cent possession this season and he says Carlo Ancelotti was happy to play the ball long when he was Blues boss

arts.ttl: Sean Dyche arrived at press conference with piece of paper and it explained just how bad Everton problems are
arts.sum: Everton FC correspondent Joe Thomas reports from Sean Dyche's pre-Leicester City press conference at Finch Farm
Steve Cooper says Leicester have met with the Premier League over "an awful human error" which gave Crystal Palace a goal in their draw.

arts.ttl: Dyche brings list to name all Everton's absentees for Leicester trip!
arts.sum: Sean Dyche brought a list to his pre-match press conference to remember all of Everton's definite or potentially missing players for this weekend's game with Leicester. James Tarkowski - may return after minor back injury

arts.ttl: 'Bombshell moments' to come from secret FFP hearing as Leicester City relax at last
arts.sum: After an arduous 19-month wait, the proceedings finally commenced in the capital this week, with reports surfacing about the location of the hearings. Man City were initially hit with charges by the Premier League in February 2023, citing 115 alleged breaches of Financial Fair Play (FFP) regulations spanning from 2009 to 2018.
